summary: Iteration 65 - Photo Management Feature Testing. All features verified working: Backend PUT /api/admin/vehicles/{id}/photos endpoint (9/9 tests passed), Frontend photo thumbnails with PRINCIPALE badge, Supprimer delete button, up/down reorder arrows, and Ajouter des photos button all visible and functional.

issues: Photo thumbnail container has dark background (#111) which may make some car images less visible - consider lighter background or border for better visibility

critical_code_review_comments: EditVehicleModal.tsx: Photo management section correctly implemented with Image component, PRINCIPALE badge, delete button, and reorder arrows
vehicles.py: New PUT /api/admin/vehicles/{id}/photos endpoint at line 207-216 correctly updates photos array
All data-testid attributes present: photo-item-{idx}, delete-photo-{idx}, move-photo-up-{idx}, move-photo-down-{idx}, upload-photo-btn
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo management feature complete. PUT /api/admin/vehicles/{id}/photos endpoint tested with add, delete, reorder operations. Frontend EditVehicleModal shows photo thumbnails with PRINCIPALE badge on first photo, Supprimer delete button, up/down reorder arrows. 3-column grid layout on vehicles page verified working.

backend_api.photo_add: PASS - Adding photos via array update works
backend_api.photo_delete: PASS - Removing photos from array works

frontend_ui.photo_thumbnail: PASS - Image component renders in dark container (460x120)
frontend_ui.principale_badge: PASS - Green PRINCIPALE badge on first photo
frontend_ui.reorder_arrows: PASS - Up (▲) and Down (▼) arrows visible
frontend_ui.add_photos_button: PASS - Green 'Ajouter des photos' button visible
frontend_ui.3_column_grid: PASS - Vehicle cards in 3-column layout on desktop
